blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,734 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
